7. ! [X0] : ~related(X0,basque) [input(axiom)]
8. ~romance(basque) [input(conjecture)]
9. ~~romance(basque) [negated conjecture 8]
10. romance(basque) [flattening 9]
12. ! [X0,X1] : (related(X0,X1) | (~romance(X0) | ~romance(X1))) [ennf transformation 2]
13. ! [X0,X1] : (related(X0,X1) | ~romance(X0) | ~romance(X1)) [flattening 12]
14. related(X0,X1) | ~romance(X0) | ~romance(X1) [cnf transformation 13]
16. romance(spanish) [cnf transformation 4]
19. ~related(X0,basque) [cnf transformation 7]
20. romance(basque) [cnf transformation 10]
22. ~romance(X0) | ~romance(basque) [resolution 14,19]
23. ~romance(X0) [forward subsumption resolution 22,20]
27. $false [resolution 23,16]
